lessons.key: surviving_mutant::for every threshold comparison add a test at the exact boundary value not only past it so a vs regression is caught
lessons.text: For every threshold comparison, add a test at the exact boundary value, not only past it, so a > vs >= regression is caught.

lessons.key: ac_gap::when a store then persist flow has a rollback edge case test the persist failure path directly not just the store failure path
lessons.text: When a store-then-persist flow has a rollback edge case, test the persist-failure path directly, not just the store-failure path.
evidence: backend/tests/test_web_sources.py (INSERT-fail edge, spec Edge Cases / SRC-09) (web)

lessons.key: spec_deviation::before designing resource specific proxy adapter routes check for an existing generic catch all that already covers them to avoid speculative duplication
lessons.text: Before designing resource-specific proxy/adapter routes, check for an existing generic catch-all that already covers them to avoid speculative duplication.

lessons.key: spec_deviation::when a ui control renders conditionally on a status flip that status on success post await rather than optimistically pre await or the optimistic flip unmounts the control and makes its in flight disabled state unobservable untestable
lessons.text: When a UI control renders conditionally on a status, flip that status on success (post-await) rather than optimistically pre-await, or the optimistic flip unmounts the control and makes its in-flight disabled state unobservable/untestable.

lessons.key: spec_deviation::a new db using test whose filename sorts before test migrations becomes the first db conn consumer so the session scoped db engine upgrade runs before test migrations downgrades to base leaving later modules with no schema and alembic env py s fileconfig clobbers app owned root logging guard env py must not call fileconfig and test migrations must restore head on teardown
lessons.text: A new DB-using test whose filename sorts before test_migrations becomes the first db_conn consumer, so the session-scoped db_engine upgrade runs before test_migrations downgrades to base — leaving later modules with no schema; and alembic env.py's fileConfig clobbers app-owned root logging. Guard: env.py must not call fileConfig, and test_migrations must restore head on teardown.

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::a citations bounded to source anchors assertion is structurally trivial while the answer adapter is the deterministic extractive one it can only cite retrieved source scoped evidence it becomes a real guard only once a generative adapter that can cite freely lands revisit the golden then
lessons.text: A 'citations bounded to source anchors' assertion is structurally trivial while the answer adapter is the deterministic extractive one (it can only cite retrieved, source-scoped evidence); it becomes a real guard only once a generative adapter that can cite freely lands — revisit the golden then.

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::when trace context fields are auto injected by a logging filter assert them on a record emitted without explicit extra so a broken binding is detectable not on a record that also passes the fields via extra
lessons.text: When trace/context fields are auto-injected by a logging filter, assert them on a record emitted WITHOUT explicit extra= so a broken binding is detectable, not on a record that also passes the fields via extra=

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::a recall k retrieval gate threshold is vacuous when k is greater than or equal to the eval corpus size size the corpus or set top k below the item count so recall k measures ranking not mere presence
lessons.text: A recall@k retrieval-gate threshold is vacuous when k is greater than or equal to the eval corpus size; size the corpus or set top_k below the item count so recall@k measures ranking, not mere presence.

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::test a per batch committed resumable task with more rows than one batch or a tiny batch size and a mid pass interruption so partial progress resume is exercised rather than inferred from unit selection alone
lessons.text: Test a per-batch-committed resumable task with more rows than one batch (or a tiny batch size) and a mid-pass interruption, so partial-progress resume is exercised rather than inferred from unit selection alone.

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::when pinning a script s safety critical flag as text assert it on the extracted command line not as a whole file substring that doc comments or dry run echoes also satisfy
lessons.text: When pinning a script's safety-critical flag as text, assert it on the extracted command line, not as a whole-file substring that doc-comments or dry-run echoes also satisfy

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::pin externally derived constants calibrated thresholds measured baselines with an exact value offline test the deriving runs are keyed manual so nothing else catches a typo when one assert enforces multiple thresholds add a single failure test per threshold a both bad case cannot attribute so an inverted comparison survives masked
lessons.text: Pin externally-derived constants (calibrated thresholds, measured baselines) with an exact-value offline test — the deriving runs are keyed/manual, so nothing else catches a typo. When one assert enforces multiple thresholds, add a single-failure test per threshold; a both-bad case cannot attribute, so an inverted comparison survives masked.

lessons.key: ac_gap::visual persistence acs sticky fixed receding chrome need an explicit class structure assertion in jsdom positional css behavior slips spec coverage when only content rendering is tested
lessons.text: Visual-persistence ACs (sticky/fixed/receding chrome) need an explicit class+structure assertion in jsdom — positional CSS behavior slips spec coverage when only content rendering is tested.

lessons.key: spec_deviation::verify error kind and enum string values against their defining module before naming them in design do not guess them from memory
lessons.text: Verify error-kind and enum string values against their defining module before naming them in design; do not guess them from memory.

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::for a preservation ac x keeps working reachable from the header add a direct positive assertion an untouched code path plus a green regression suite is not evidence for the clause
lessons.text: For a preservation AC ('X keeps working' / 'reachable from the header'), add a direct positive assertion — an untouched code path plus a green regression suite is not evidence for the clause.
